carry_casting_bundle.query: a worker carries a connected bundle of silver cast-metal parts by hand from the work table toward a wooden crate

put_casting_into_crate.query: a worker lowers the connected silver casting into the wooden crate directly in front of him

pick_up_hammer.query: after returning from the crate, a worker reaches to the work table and lifts the wooden-handled hammer with his right hand

hammer_casting.query: a worker repeatedly strikes silver cast-metal parts on the work table with a wooden-handled hammer
